'''thanufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khatun|khatun]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khatun|khatun]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thanufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thænifith|thænifith]] || [[word:thænifij|thænifij]] || [[word:thænifish|thænifish]] || [[word:thænifi|thænifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thanunufuth|thanunufuth]] || [[word:thanunufuj|thanunufuj]] || [[word:thanunufush|thanunufush]] || [[word:thanunufu|thanunufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanufuth|thanufuth]] || [[word:thanufuj|thanufuj]] || [[word:thanufush|thanufush]] || [[word:thanufu|thanufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanuffuth|thanuffuth]] || [[word:thanuffuj|thanuffuj]] || [[word:thanuffush|thanuffush]] || [[word:thanuffuf|thanuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thanufuthu|thanufuthu]] || [[word:thanufuju|thanufuju]] || [[word:thanufushu|thanufushu]] || [[word:thanufuku|thanufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thanufuth|thanufuth]] || [[word:thanufuj|thanufuj]] || [[word:thanufush|thanufush]] || [[word:thanufu|thanufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thanufuthul|thanufuthul]] || [[word:thanufujul|thanufujul]] || [[word:thanufushul|thanufushul]] || [[word:thanufukul|thanufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thanufuthuthu|thanufuthuthu]] || [[word:thanufujuju|thanufujuju]] || [[word:thanufushushu|thanufushushu]] || [[word:thanufuku|thanufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thanufuthun|thanufuthun]] || [[word:thanufujun|thanufujun]] || [[word:thanufushun|thanufushun]] || [[word:thanufukun|thanufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thanufuthuoro|thanufuthuoro]] || [[word:thanufujuoro|thanufujuoro]] || [[word:thanufushuoro|thanufushuoro]] || [[word:thanufukuoro|thanufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
